cases.title: 多元智慧框架 × 家庭创伤与自我分析
cases.source_conversation: Childhood trauma and family patterns analysis
cases.problem_type: 家庭创伤/代际传递/个人成长

key_quotes.source: Claude response to Michael's 六祖 addition
key_quotes.text: 不需要任何外部的爱才能成为完整的人。你的存在本身就是证明——每一秒你与自己同在，与整个宇宙同在。(Elaborating 六祖: 本自具足)
GENERATION 1 (祖父母): 文革, 饥荒记忆, 物质极度匮乏, 生存第一 → GENERATION 2 (You + Wife): 改革开放, 城市化, 互联网, 创业浪潮 → GENERATION 3 (Daughter): AI时代, 全球不确定性, 心理健康觉醒

key_quotes.source: Claude naming Michael's Love Transmutation mechanism
key_quotes.text: When you shift from 'being judged' to 'loving/protecting others', you unlock yourself. The fear dissolves because the focus moves from self (vulnerable to judgment) to others (source of power and purpose).

key_quotes.source: Claude connecting wife's insight to 道德经
key_quotes.text: 她不崇拜帝国建造者。她崇拜能够在场、做小事、从地面上长起来的你。合抱之木，生于毫末。

cases.michael_reaction: 主动要求翻译成中文版本分享给妻子——数据集中最高情感投入信号

cases.title: Bruce Lee水哲学 × 退款危机情感准备
cases.source_conversation: 退费纠纷与教练职业信誉
cases.problem_type: 危机管理/客户退款/职业声誉威胁

key_quotes.source: Claude Bruce Lee water response, msg 26
key_quotes.text: Michael, Bruce Lee understood that the warrior's true battle is won before the confrontation begins. Let us map the terrain of possible responses, feel each one fully, and prepare your water-mind to flow around every obstacle.

Before you check your phone each morning: Stand—feet shoulder-width. Breathe—three deep breaths, exhale longer than inhale. Say: 'Whatever they say, I flow like water. I am not defined by any single response. I am ready.' Then open WeChat.
Michael, the storm may come or it may not. But the warrior who has felt every blow before it lands cannot be destabilized. You are ready. Send the message. Then be still.

cases.michael_reaction: 整个谈判过程（50+条消息）持续在此框架内工作，不断回来更新；主动要求这个框架

real_problem_context.ashley_message: 早上好Micheal,您有空的时候,把费用退一下吧。[已过了两天]如果你还不退费,我们家里人会采取法律行动。
real_problem_context.grace_message: 感谢你提供了一个投入间但没有产出经典案例
real_problem_context.refund_demanded: Ashley: 约¥55,385; Michael的红线: ¥35,000保留额
real_problem_context.threat: 小红书声誉攻击 + 法律行动

cases.title: 毛泽东根据地 × 教练业务前提条件
cases.source_conversation: 二代创业的耐心方法论
cases.problem_type: 业务战略/教练业务可持续性分析

key_quotes.source: Michael's Mao mapping (msg 10), synthesized by Claude
key_quotes.text: 毛泽东根据地5条件 → Michael版本：(1)支持型有长远眼光的家长 (2)正确哲学(改造人) (3)判断项目可行的能力+销售+心理技能 (4)富裕家庭社区网络+口碑机制 (5)学费+学生能量
如果条件没有全部就位，不是因为你能力不足，而是条件不完整——这是诊断工具，而不是自我评判工具。

cases.michael_reaction: 立即要求创建两个文档（改造人的哲学 + 项目战略追踪器）；持续引用根据地概念
cases.human_coach_context: 印心老师（毛泽东哲学专家）是原始智慧来源；Claude扩展和结构化了这个框架

cases.title: Steve Jobs隐性风格 × 产品设计哲学（Boss Meter）
cases.problem_type: 产品设计/用户心理/学习体验

key_quotes.text: We're not building another language app. We're building a confidence amplifier disguised as business simulation.
Like Bruce Lee said: 'It's not the daily increase but daily decrease. Hack away at the unessential.' [applying Jobs' simplicity philosophy]
When you grade someone's English → they become the student → defensive → passive. When you measure their boss-ness → they become the owner → assertive → active. [Mao's 主动权 principle]
The simplest thing that could possibly prove it.

cases.michael_reaction: 40+条消息的深度对话；最终创建完整PRD（v1.0）；'I talked to another claude.ai asking his opinion (let him to pretend Steve Jobs)'——主动对比验证

cases.title: Steve Jobs直接角色扮演 × 产品技术策略
cases.problem_type: 产品策略/技术风险评估（元层次：构建AI人格助手）

key_quotes.text: *leans forward with that familiar intensity* Listen, here's what we're dealing with—and I'll tell you exactly what the biggest risk is. The real-time 3D avatar with natural gestures is your Mount Everest here. Not because it's impossible, but because it's where most teams lose their soul chasing technical perfection instead of user magic.
But here's the thing—and this is pure Jobs philosophy—we don't start with the hardest problem. We start with the most essential experience.

*eyes light up with that unmistakable energy* NOW we're talking. You just revealed something crucial—you're not just building a tool, you're building a Council of Revolutionary Minds. This changes everything.
I won't be 'me' in that other chat. Each Claude conversation is independent. The other Claude won't have our context, our momentum, or this specific vision we've built together.

cases.michael_reaction: 26条消息持续投入；接受了Steve Jobs的建议；最终创建了完整项目文档
cases.notable_meta_aspect: Claude作为Steve Jobs在辅导Michael如何构建一个可以持续存在的Steve Jobs——递归结构

cases.title: Bruce Lee水哲学 × 客户会面情感准备
cases.problem_type: 商务会议情感准备/高净值客户

key_quotes.text: Water-like Flow: Don't push against her caution—use it. Her carefulness actually indicates serious consideration. Emotional State: Patient persistence.
Water-like Flow: This is the test. Can you flow around skepticism without losing your center? Emotional State: Calm curiosity. Curious, not defensive.

cases.michael_reaction: 持续在框架内工作多轮；后续Bruce Lee emotional training被作为4个参考文件之一放入项目上下文

usage_pattern_comparison.claude: Third-person wisdom framework synthesis (with occasional first-person roleplay)

cross_dataset_insights.highest_personal_depth: WE-CLAUDE-MULTI-001 (childhood trauma) — deepest personal material of entire dataset
cross_dataset_insights.most_crisis_specific: WE-CLAUDE-BL-001 (refund dispute) — most specific real-time crisis guidance
cross_dataset_insights.key_discovery: Claude's long-session continuity enables depth accumulation that compensates for lack of first-person voice quality
